title: 00877_Reparameterized_Policy_Learning_for_Multimodal_Trajectory_Optimization
positive_examples: The method can help agents evade local optima in tasks with dense rewards and solve challenging sparse-reward environments by incorporating an object-centric intrinsic reward.
RPG consistently outperforms previous approaches across a range of tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness in exploration and optimization in continuous control problems.
negative_examples: The intrinsic reward design relies on assumptions regarding the recognition of objects and their spatial positioning, which may be unsuitable in environments with unidentified objects.
Learning the world model typically results in a slower pace of gradient updates, which could hinder performance in real-time applications.
